speaker: speaker1
text: I have some great news ! I was able to switch to the night shift !

speaker: speaker2
text: I knew everything would work out for you !

speaker: speaker1
text: I got to meet the night Anger today too . We got along right from the start .

speaker: speaker2
text: Wonderful ! Do you already have your work schedule ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Not yet , I pick it up tomorrow .

speaker: speaker2
text: Do you know what you will be doing yet ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , I'll be managing the guys on the dock .

speaker: speaker2
text: You're so good with people . I think they will like you !
